topic: Fresh snow each morning shows one set of footprints circling my house, never entering.
title: Footprints Circle My House in the Snow | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: Every morning fresh snow shows one set of footprints circling my house.
scenes.image_prompt: A single trail of footprints curving around a small house in fresh snow, dim dawn light, soft fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I live alone at the end of a quiet country road.
scenes.image_prompt: An isolated house at the end of a snowy road, low light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The prints never approach the door.
scenes.image_prompt: Footprints in snow stopping short of a front porch, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: They circle the whole house, then simply stop at the start.
scenes.image_prompt: A complete loop of footprints around a house in unbroken snow, low light, fog, vertical 9:16 framing
A person bent over a trail of footprints in deep snow, deep shadow, soft grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: They went around and around, with no end and no beginning.
scenes.image_prompt: Footprints forming an endless ring in fresh snow around a yard, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I stayed up to watch the snow that night.
scenes.image_prompt: A dark window looking out over a moonlit snowy yard, deep shadow, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: By dawn the prints were there, but I had seen no one.
scenes.image_prompt: Fresh footprints in snow at sunrise with no figure in sight, soft fog, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each morning the circle tightens, drawing closer to my walls.
scenes.image_prompt: A ring of footprints in snow pressed near the foundation of a house, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Today the prints stopped, facing the door, and pointed inward.
scenes.image_prompt: Two footprints in snow halted directly before a front door, deep shadow, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: There were none leading away, only the ones coming in.
scenes.image_prompt: A single trail of footprints leading up to a closed door and ending, dim dawn light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The snow inside my hallway still has not melted.
scenes.image_prompt: A faint trail of melting snow across a dim interior hallway floor, low light, soft grain, vertical 9:16 framing
